prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic vertical full-body portrait of a fierce female gladiator warrior striding forward through a dusty ancient Roman colosseum arena. She is centered in the frame, tall and athletic, with long dark hair tied in a high messy warrior bun with loose strands blowing in the wind; keep her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur for anonymity. She wears ornate battle-worn bronze and dark leather gladiator armor: sculpted breastplate, asymmetrical decorated shoulder pauldron on one side, leather strap harnesses crossing the torso, layered skirt panels, bracers, one tall engraved greave, lace-up gladiator sandals, and a tattered deep burgundy cloak hanging from one shoulder. She holds one short sword angled downward in her right hand and one round shield strapped to her left arm. The arena floor is sandy, chaotic, and littered with exactly 6 notable foreground props: 2 fallen helmets, 1 coiled net, 1 dropped round shield, and 2 cylindrical scroll-like or weapon-handle objects beside torn red cloth. In the background, show a massive stone amphitheater with arched openings, red banners, metal gates, and exactly 3 large flaming braziers on raised stands. Include exactly 2 armored male gladiator guards standing in the left background and exactly 1 lion near the right-side gate. Lighting should be dramatic golden-hour sunlight mixed with firelight, with dust in the air, strong rim light, high detail, gritty texture, shallow depth of field, epic historical fantasy atmosphere, realistic proportions, cinematic color grading, no modern objects, no text, no watermark.
